category_sources: source_facts.description says charm-tools is for authoring and maintaining Juju charms; the official docs describe commands for building, maintaining, and releasing Juju charms.
display_name_sources: The official GitHub repository README is titled Juju Charm Tools; source_facts.name is charm-tools.
docs_sources: The official Read the Docs site is dedicated Charm Tools documentation; the official GitHub README is also available.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; source_facts.homepage is the official juju/charm-tools GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names authoring and maintaining Juju charms; source_facts.executables lists charm-build, charm-create, charm-proof, and related CLI commands.
